post.summary: Create a new order. You can use our Zapier integration to connect order creation directly with your store.

200.description: Payment link generated or charged successfully

schema.description: In some cases the order is charged successfully and an empty body is returned

400.description: Bad request (e.g. invalid kit type or multiple kit types without enough credits)

409.description: Conflict (e.g. not enough credits, payment method missing, or purchasing disabled)

labParamsError.description: Lab parameter errors detected for this report

parameters.name: kitID
parameters.description: Filter by kit IDs, join multiple IDs with a comma (limit 50 IDs per request)

parameters.name: orderID
parameters.description: Filter by order IDs, join multiple IDs with a comma (limit 50 IDs per request)

200.description: List of business kits retrieved successfully

get.summary: Validate if a kit ID exists for the authenticated business

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API token

message.example: An error occurred while validating kit

post.summary: Register a kit for a customer
post.description:
Registers a kit to a customer. If the customer does not exist, one is created automatically.
Registration triggers asynchronous lab processing — the response confirms initiation, not completion.

**Note:** This endpoint is temporarily disabled and returns 503. It will be enabled in a future release.

phone.description: Phone number (required for EasyDraw kits to receive SMS instructions)

consentForResearch.description: Whether the customer consents to research use of their data

404.description: Kit not found or does not belong to this business

message.example: An error occurred while registering the kit

error.example: This endpoint is not available yet

get.summary: Get list of all available biomarkers

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the biomarker

message.example: An error occurred while retrieving biomarkers

email.description: Valid email address for the customer

customTags.description: Optional custom tags for the customer

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

gender.description: Gender (M for male, F for female)

409.description: Customer with this email already exists

error.example: A customer with this email already exists

post.summary: Add data for a B2B customer (quiz, test results, or file). For large file processing, you can request asynchronous processing.

userId.description: ID of the customer to add data for

date.description: Date when the quiz was taken (ISO 8601 format)

userId.description: ID of the customer to add data for

date.description: Date when the test was taken (ISO 8601 format)

userId.description: ID of the customer to add data for

date.description: Date when the uploaded test was taken (ISO 8601 format)

fileBlob.description:
Data URI string with base64 content (e.g., "data:application/pdf;base64,JVBER...").
Provide either fileBlob or s3FileUrl, not both.
Allowed types: PDF, JPEG, JPG, PNG.

s3FileUrl.description: URL to S3 file (provide either fileBlob or s3FileUrl, not both)

async.description: If true, process asynchronously. Returns 202 with jobId. Poll GET /api/v1/customer/add-data/jobs/{id}.

quizData.question: How many hours of sleep did you get?

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous processing (file uploads only when async=true)

403.description: User does not belong to this business or feature is not enabled

error.example: Uploads feature is not enabled for this business

get.summary: Check status of an extract markers job

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID returned by the async add-data request

result.description: Same payload as synchronous file add-data response

get.summary: Get a specific order by ID

orderStatus.description: Fulfillment order status - possible values: pending, preparing, in_progress, scheduled, needs_review, completed, canceled, third_party_failure

quantity.description: Number of kits in the order

externalID.description: External customer/order identifier (Optional - only present if set during order creation)

externalTags.description: External tags for categorization (Optional - only present if set during order creation)

registeredTo.description: Information about the customer who registered the kit (Optional - only present if kit has been registered by an end user)

kits.description: List of kits associated with this order

kitStatus.description: Kit status - possible values: preparing, inTransit, delivered, registered, collected, deliveryException, registrationException, canceled

sampleStatus.description: Sample status - possible values: awaitingCollection, inTransit, collected, received, delivered, rejected, resulted, partiallyResulted, collectionException, deliveryException, canceled

registeredToEmail.description: Email of customer who registered this kit (Optional - only present if kit is registered)

get.summary: List all orders with optional filtering

parameters.name: orderDateStart
parameters.description: Filter orders created on or after this date (ISO 8601 format - YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ or YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: orderDateEnd
parameters.description: Filter orders created on or before this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: registrationDateStart
parameters.description: Filter orders with kits registered on or after this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: registrationDateEnd
parameters.description: Filter orders with kits registered on or before this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: registeredTo
parameters.description: Filter by customer email or customer ID

200.description: List of orders retrieved successfully with pagination metadata

registeredToEmail.description: Email of customer who registered this kit (Optional)

total.description: Total number of orders matching the filters

hasNext.description: Whether there are more pages after the current one

hasPrevious.description: Whether there are pages before the current one

post.summary: Create a new AI chat conversation

userId.description: ID of the user to create conversation for

initialMessage.description: The initial message to start the conversation

customInstructions.description: Optional custom instructions for the AI in this conversation

example.initialMessage: What do my recent test results mean?
example.customInstructions: Focus on preventive health measures and lifestyle improvements

chats.content: {"sections":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","content":"What do my recent test results mean?"}]}
I'll help you understand your recent test results...

403.description: User does not belong to this business

error.example: User does not belong to this business

message.example: An error occurred while creating conversation

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

firstMessage.content: What do my recent test results mean?

post.summary: Send a message to an existing conversation

message.description: The message to send to the AI

example.message: Can you explain my cholesterol levels in more detail?

chats.content: {"sections":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","content":"Can you explain my cholesterol levels in more detail?"}]}
Let me break down your cholesterol levels for you...

403.description: Conversation does not belong to this business

error.example: Conversation does not belong to this business

message.example: An error occurred while sending message

tags.description: Array of tags to assign to the conversation

notes.description: Note to add to the conversation

example.notes: Patient expressed concern about family history of heart disease

notes.note: Patient expressed concern about family history

403.description: Conversation does not belong to this business
Conversation does not belong to this business

error.example: Conversation does not belong to this business

post.summary: Send a chat message (creates new conversation if no chatId provided)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID to send the message for

chatId.description: Optional conversation ID. If provided, continues existing conversation. If omitted, creates new conversation.

userMessage.description: The message to send to the AI

customInstructions.description: Optional custom instructions for new conversations (ignored if chatId is provided)

value.userMessage: What do my recent test results mean?
value.customInstructions: Focus on preventive health measures and lifestyle improvements

value.userMessage: Can you explain my cholesterol levels in more detail?

userMessage.description: The user's message that was sent

saiResponse.description: The AI's response as a JSON string containing chat sections

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was processed

chatId.description: The conversation ID (newly created or existing)

example.userMessage: What do my recent test results mean?
example.saiResponse: {"sections":[{"type":"PARAGRAPH","content":"I'll help you understand your recent test results. Based on your data..."}],"followUpQuestions":["How can I improve my cholesterol levels?","What dietary changes are recommended?"]}

403.description: User does not belong to this business or conversation does not belong to this business

error.example: User does not belong to this business

404.description: User not found or conversation not found (when chatId is provided)

message.example: An error occurred while processing chat message

get.summary: Get product offerings JSON string for the business

200.description: Product offerings JSON string retrieved successfully

schema.description: JSON string containing array of product offerings, or empty string if none exist

application/json.example: [{"id":"prod-123","type":"product","name":"Vitamin D3","longDescription":"High-quality vitamin D3 supplement for bone health","shortDescription":"Bone health supplement","keywords":["vitamin","health","bones"],"imageUrl":"https://example.com/image.jpg","productUrl":"https://shop.example.com/vitamin-d3","biomarkers":["vitamin_d"]}]

message.example: An error occurred while retrieving product offerings

post.summary: Update product offerings for the business

productOfferingsJson.description: JSON string containing array of product offerings. Send empty string or empty array to delete.
productOfferingsJson.example: [{"id":"prod-123","name":"Vitamin D3","longDescription":"High-quality vitamin D3 supplement for bone health","shortDescription":"Bone health supplement","keywords":["vitamin","health","bones"],"imageUrl":"https://example.com/image.jpg","productUrl":"https://shop.example.com/vitamin-d3","biomarkers":["vitamin_d"]}]

example.productOfferingsJson: [{"id":"prod-123","name":"Vitamin D3","longDescription":"High-quality vitamin D3 supplement for bone health","shortDescription":"Bone health supplement","keywords":["vitamin","health","bones"],"imageUrl":"https://example.com/image.jpg","productUrl":"https://shop.example.com/vitamin-d3","biomarkers":["vitamin_d"]}]

message.example: The productOfferingsJson must be valid JSON

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: Authorization: Token <TOKEN_HERE> To get your API token, log in to the admin dashboard at https://admin.siphoxhealth.com and copy the API token from the main page.

purchase_with_attached_payment.description: false - use attached payment method to place on demand orders. false - use credits if available, otherwise use attached payment method. If payment method is not attached, pending order will be created with ability to pay from admin dashboard.

is_notify_receiver.description: Send delivery notification email to the kit recipient

is_test_order.description: Use this parameter to create test orders

suggestions.text: Consider leaving your smartphone and any other screens outside your bedroom before going to bed. This will help you fall asleep faster and improve your sleep efficiency.
